activities.title: Lakeside Stroll and Souvenir Browsing
activities.description: Take a leisurely walk along the vibrant Lakeside promenade, exploring local shops and enjoying the lively atmosphere as the sun sets.

activities.title: Zipline Adventure
activities.description: Experience the thrill of one of the world's longest and steepest ziplines, offering incredible views as you descend.

activities.title: Leisurely Breakfast
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxed breakfast at your hotel, reflecting on your Annapurna journey.

activities.title: Souvenir Shopping (optional)
activities.description: Grab some last-minute souvenirs or gifts from the local market before heading to the airport.

activities.title: Traditional Nepali Dinner with Cultural Show
activities.description: Enjoy a traditional Nepali dinner accompanied by a live cultural performance showcasing local music and dance.

activities.title: Lunch at a Lakeside Restaurant
activities.description: Savor a fresh seafood lunch at a charming restaurant by Begnas Lake, enjoying the serene atmosphere.
activities.location: The Begnas Lake Resort & Villas Restaurant

activities.title: Explore Mahendra Cave
activities.description: Discover the unique limestone formations within Mahendra Cave, a natural wonder named after King Mahendra Bir Bikram Shah Dev.

activities.title: Bungee Jumping Experience
activities.description: For the ultimate thrill-seeker, experience bungee jumping over a stunning gorge in Pokhara.

activities.title: Traditional Nepali Massage
activities.description: Indulge in a relaxing traditional Nepali massage to soothe muscles and rejuvenate your senses.
activities.location: Jiva Spa, Temple Tree Resort & Spa

activities.title: Themed Dinner at a Luxury Hotel
activities.description: Experience a themed dinner night at a luxury hotel, offering a special menu and ambiance.

activities.title: Resort Grounds Exploration
activities.description: Take a guided tour of the resort's organic farm and learn about sustainable practices.

activities.title: Luxury Airport Transfer
activities.description: Enjoy a comfortable private transfer to Pokhara International Airport for your departure.
activities.location: The Pavilions Himalayas to Pokhara International Airport

activities.title: Early Morning Heritage Walk at Kathmandu Durbar Square
activities.description: Arrive early to beat crowds — explore Kumari Ghar, Hanuman Dhoka Palace, and the Taleju Temple before the tourist buses arrive.

activities.title: Asan Bazaar Spice Market Browse
activities.description: Walk through the seven-temple intersection — turmeric, incense, and dried goods spill onto the lanes. Great for photography too.

activities.title: Afternoon Stroll Through Thamel Lanes
activities.description: Browse bookshops, thangka galleries, and singing bowl shops without buying — it's free entertainment.

activities.title: Golden Hour at Swayambhunath Stupa
activities.description: Climb the 365 steps as the sun drops — the golden spire glows and the valley spreads below you. Resident monkeys make it theatrical.

activities.title: Thrilling Paragliding Experience
activities.description: Soar through the skies with a tandem paragliding flight, offering unparalleled aerial views of Pokhara valley and the Himalayas.

activities.title: Buff Momo Breakfast at OR2K
activities.description: Famous vegetarian cafe steps from Boudhanath — try the buff momo and mint lemonade.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Lunch at Narayan Cafe
activities.description: Rooftop cafe with valley glimpses — unlimited dal bhat for NPR 250, a backpacker institution.

activities.title: Afternoon Rituals at Pashupatinath Ghats
activities.description: Sacred cremation ghats on the Bagmati River — witness Hindu rituals, sadhus, and the atmosphere of one of Asia's holiest sites.

activities.title: Royal Palace Guided Tour at Kathmandu Durbar Square
activities.description: Expert local guide leads you through Hanuman Dhoka Palace, the living goddess Kumari's courtyard, and the ancient Taleju Temple.

activities.title: Arrival at Pokhara Airport
activities.description: Arrive at Pokhara Airport, the gateway to the Annapurna region, and transfer to your hotel near Phewa Lake.

activities.title: Check-in and Relaxation
activities.description: Check into your comfortable lakeside hotel and take some time to relax after your journey.

activities.title: Lakeside Dinner Experience
activities.description: Savor a delightful dinner at a popular restaurant along the vibrant Lakeside promenade, enjoying the evening ambiance.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum
activities.description: Learn about the history of mountaineering and the diverse cultures of the Himalayan people at this informative museum.

activities.title: Drive to Nayapul and Trek Start
activities.description: Take a scenic drive from Pokhara to Nayapul, the starting point of your Annapurna trek.

activities.title: Overnight Stay in Ulleri
activities.description: Check into a traditional teahouse in Ulleri, enjoy a local dinner, and prepare for the next day's trek.

activities.title: Lunch at Nangethanti
activities.description: Stop for a hearty lunch at a teahouse in Nangethanti, a small village on the way to Ghorepani.

activities.title: Poon Hill Sunrise Trek
activities.description: Wake up early for a pre-dawn trek to Poon Hill, famous for its panoramic sunrise views over the Himalayas.

activities.title: Overnight Stay in Tadapani
activities.description: Arrive at Tadapani, a small village offering stunning close-up views of Annapurna South and Machhapuchhre, and settle into your lodge.

activities.title: Visit the Gurung Museum
activities.description: Discover the rich history, traditions, and artifacts of the Gurung community at the local museum.

activities.title: Final Trek Segment to Kimche/Syauli Bazar
activities.description: Embark on the last section of your trek, descending from Ghandruk to Kimche or Syauli Bazar.

activities.title: Relaxation at Lakeside Hotel
activities.description: Check back into a comfortable hotel in Pokhara and enjoy some well-deserved rest after your trek.

activities.title: Arrival at Pokhara Airport
activities.description: Arrive at Pokhara Airport, the gateway to the Annapurna region, and transfer to your hotel near Phewa Lake.

activities.title: Check-in and Relaxation
activities.description: Check into your comfortable lakeside hotel and take some time to relax after your journey.

activities.title: Visit Devi's Fall and Gupteshwor Cave
activities.description: Explore the intriguing Devi's Fall, a unique waterfall, and the sacred Gupteshwor Cave located directly opposite.

activities.title: Evening Walk and Shopping in Lakeside
activities.description: Enjoy a leisurely stroll along Lakeside Road, browsing local shops for souvenirs and handicrafts.

activities.title: Ascend the Ulleri Staircase
activities.description: Challenge yourself with the famous stone staircase leading up to the large Magar village of Ulleri, offering initial mountain views.

activities.title: Lunch at Nangethanti
activities.description: Stop for a hearty lunch at a teahouse in Nangethanti, a small village on the way to Ghorepani.

activities.title: Poon Hill Sunrise Trek
activities.description: Wake up early for a pre-dawn trek to Poon Hill, famous for its panoramic sunrise views over the Himalayas.

activities.title: Overnight Stay in Tadapani
activities.description: Arrive at Tadapani, a small village offering stunning close-up views of Annapurna South and Machhapuchhre, and settle into your lodge.

activities.title: Explore Ghandruk Village Center
activities.description: Wander through the charming stone houses and narrow alleys of Ghandruk, observing the local way of life.

activities.title: Final Trek Segment to Kimche/Syauli Bazar
activities.description: Embark on the last section of your trek, descending from Ghandruk to Kimche or Syauli Bazar.

activities.title: Drive from Syauli Bazar to Pokhara
activities.description: Take a jeep or bus from Syauli Bazar back to Pokhara, enjoying the changing landscapes.

activities.title: Leisurely Breakfast
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxed breakfast at your hotel, reflecting on your Annapurna journey.

activities.title: Street Food Crawl through Asan Bazaar
activities.description: Chatpate, pani puri, and fresh sel roti from the stalls at the seven-temple crossroads.

activities.title: Garden of Dreams Afternoon Escape
activities.description: The most peaceful garden in Kathmandu — neoclassical pavilions, fountains, and bougainvillea. Perfect post-lunch rest.

activities.title: UNESCO Walk at Patan Durbar Square
activities.description: Finest concentration of Newari architecture — Krishna Mandir, Vishwanath Temple, and the stunning Sundari Chowk.

activities.title: Arrival and Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Pokhara, transfer to your hotel, and settle into your comfortable room, preparing for the adventures ahead.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Boating & Tal Barahi Temple Visit
activities.description: Enjoy a serene boat ride on Phewa Lake, taking in the picturesque surroundings and visiting the sacred Tal Barahi Temple located on an island.

activities.title: Romantic Dinner by the Lake
activities.description: Savor a delightful dinner at a lakeside restaurant, enjoying delicious local and international cuisine with beautiful views of Phewa Lake.

activities.title: Sarangkot Sunrise Viewpoint
activities.description: Wake up early to witness a breathtaking sunrise over the Annapurna mountain range from the famous Sarangkot viewpoint.

activities.title: Explore Devi's Falls and Gupteshwor Cave
activities.description: Visit the mysterious Devi's Falls, where the Pardi Khola river disappears underground, and explore the ancient Gupteshwor Mahadev Cave opposite it.

activities.title: World Peace Pagoda Sunset
activities.description: Hike or drive up to the World Peace Pagoda for panoramic views of Pokhara valley, Phewa Lake, and a stunning sunset over the mountains.
activities.formatted_address: 6W2V+4JQ, World Peace Stupa Access Rd, Pokhara 33700

activities.title: Visit International Mountain Museum
activities.description: Gain insight into the history of mountaineering, the diverse ethnic groups of Nepal, and the geology of the Himalayan region.

activities.title: Deep Dive at Patan Museum
activities.description: Best museum in Nepal — classical Nepali bronze, stone, and wood art displayed inside a beautifully restored royal palace.

activities.title: Explore Patan's Golden Temple (Hiranya Varna Mahavihar)
activities.description: A shimmering gilded Buddhist monastery hidden inside Patan's old town — monks chant here daily at 4 PM.

activities.title: Newari Handicraft Shopping in Patan
activities.description: The best place to buy handmade dhaka fabric, lokta paper goods, and genuine bronze statues direct from artisans.

activities.title: Discover Seti River Gorge
activities.description: Marvel at the Seti River's incredible power as it carves a deep, narrow gorge through the city, often hidden from plain sight.

activities.title: Last-minute Souvenir Shopping & Lunch
activities.description: Enjoy some final souvenir shopping for local crafts and gifts, followed by a casual lunch at a popular cafe before departure.

activities.title: Departure from Pokhara
activities.description: Check out from your hotel and head to the airport for your onward journey, filled with memories of your Pokhara adventure.

activities.title: Sunrise Yoga & Meditation
activities.description: Start your day with a private yoga and meditation session, overlooking the valley as the sun rises.

activities.title: Visit Tal Barahi Temple
activities.description: Visit the sacred Tal Barahi Temple, a two-story pagoda-style temple situated on a small island in Phewa Lake.
activities.location: Tal Barahi Temple, Phewa Lake Island

activities.title: Explore Devi's Fall
activities.description: Witness the mesmerizing Devi's Fall, where the Pardi Khola river mysteriously disappears underground.

activities.title: Sarangkot Sunrise View
activities.description: Embark on an early morning drive to Sarangkot to witness a spectacular sunrise over the Annapurna and Dhaulagiri mountain ranges.

activities.title: Afternoon Tea at Resort
activities.description: Relax back at your resort with a luxurious afternoon tea, enjoying a selection of fine teas and pastries.

activities.title: Luxury Spa Treatment
activities.description: Indulge in a rejuvenating spa treatment, choosing from a range of massages and holistic therapies to soothe your body and mind.

activities.title: Explore Pokhara Old Bazaar
activities.description: Wander through the vibrant Pokhara Old Bazaar, experiencing the traditional Newari architecture and local market life.

activities.title: Evening Cocktails at a Luxury Bar
activities.description: Enjoy sophisticated cocktails and appetizers at a luxury bar with stunning views of Phewa Lake.

activities.title: Morning Leisure & Resort Amenities
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxed morning at your resort, perhaps with a swim or a quiet moment with a book.

activities.title: Rooftop Sunset View from Patan
activities.description: The western-facing rooftop restaurants around the square offer unbeatable sunset silhouettes of the pagodas.

activities.title: Sunrise Meditation at Swayambhunath
activities.description: Early morning when the stupa is peaceful — prayer flags, monks doing kora, and the valley slowly waking below.

activities.title: Thangka Studio Deep Dive in Boudha
activities.description: Watch masters create intricate Buddhist paintings — many studios offer short demonstrations and explain the iconography.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Gardens Walk
activities.description: The peaceful Tibetan Buddhist monastery above Boudha — walk the gardens and prayer hall, guided by resident monks.

activities.title: Newari Breakfast at Honacha
activities.description: Best Newari breakfast in the valley — bara (lentil patties), aloo tama, and a tiny clay cup of chiya.

activities.title: Ultralight Flight Experience
activities.description: Embark on an ultralight flight for a unique bird's-eye view of the Annapurna range, lakes, and Pokhara Valley.

activities.title: Souvenir Shopping & Packing
activities.description: Spend your afternoon picking up last-minute souvenirs and preparing for your departure.

activities.title: Morning Swim & Breakfast
activities.description: Enjoy a final leisurely morning swim and breakfast at the resort, soaking in the last moments of luxury.

activities.title: Final Lakeside Walk & Coffee
activities.description: Enjoy a final peaceful walk along the Lakeside promenade, perhaps with a coffee at a favorite cafe.
activities.location: Lakeside Promenade & Famous Blue Bird Cafe

activities.title: Leisurely Breakfast at Resort
activities.description: Enjoy a final luxurious breakfast at your resort before checking out.

activities.title: Momo Tour of Thamel — 3 Shops
activities.description: Work through three legendary momo spots: OR2K for veg, Momo Star for buff, and Yangling for Tibetan-style jhol momo.

activities.title: Spa Reflexology Session
activities.description: Treat yourself to a relaxing reflexology session to unwind before your journey home.

activities.title: Cheap Chiya and Sel Roti at Indra Chowk
activities.description: Famous bead market — grab tea and fresh sel roti from a street stall for under NPR 50.

activities.title: Handicraft Shopping
activities.description: Browse exquisite Nepali handicrafts, thangka paintings, and local artworks at specialized shops in Lakeside.

activities.title: Lunch at Local Thakali Kitchen
activities.description: Authentic Thakali set — dal bhat, gundruk, and three curries. Unlimited rice refills.

activities.title: Dawn Kora at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: Walk the circumambulation path with monks as butter lamps are lit. The morning light on the golden spire is extraordinary.

activities.title: Thangka Painting Studio Visit
activities.description: Watch master artists create intricate Buddhist thangkas in the studios lining the stupa — no obligation to buy.

activities.title: Evening Aarti Ceremony at the Ghats
activities.description: Stay on for the evening fire aarti — priests perform the ritual as the sun sets over the Bagmati. Free from the riverbank.

activities.title: Freak Street Espresso Stop
activities.description: The original 1970s backpacker street — grab a filter coffee at one of the old cafes and soak in the history.

activities.title: Thamel Evening Market Browse
activities.description: The lanes come alive after dark — street performers, handicrafts, and rooftop bars all within walking distance.

activities.title: Gourmet Dinner at Dwarika's Hotel
activities.description: Exceptional Newari architecture and the finest Nepali dining in Kathmandu. Book ahead — it's worth every rupee.

activities.title: Coffee in the Award-Winning Patan Museum Cafe
activities.description: The most beautiful cafe courtyard in Nepal — fresh filter coffee among ancient carved stone.

activities.title: Natural History Museum Visit Below the Stupa
activities.description: Small but fascinating — Himalayan wildlife specimens, butterfly collections, and mineral displays. Right at Swayambhunath's base.

activities.title: Momo Lunch at Flavors Cafe Boudha
activities.description: Local favorite near the stupa — steamed buff momos and thukpa served with chilli sauce.

activities.title: Farewell Dal Bhat at Narayan Cafe
activities.description: Rooftop cafe with Himalayan views — unlimited dal bhat to close out the trip.

activities.title: Chiya Break at a Roadside Teashop
activities.description: Pull up a plastic stool at one of Asan's street-side tea stalls — milky spiced chai and people-watching.

activities.title: Rooftop Aperitivo at Kantipur Temple House
activities.description: Pre-dinner drinks on the heritage rooftop — spectacular view of the old city at dusk.

activities.title: Yomari Discovery at Newari Heritage Kitchen
activities.description: Try yomari — sweet steamed rice dumplings filled with chaku molasses, a Newari delicacy only locals know.

activities.title: Sunset Drinks at OR2K Rooftop
activities.description: The best rooftop in Thamel — lime soda and views of the stupa silhouette at golden hour.

activities.title: Pottery Square Workshop and Chiura Tasting
activities.description: Watch potters at work, then buy freshly beaten chiura (flattened rice) from the square vendors — eat it with yoghurt.

activities.title: Dattatreya Square and Peacock Window
activities.description: The finest woodcarving in Nepal — the 500-year-old peacock window is extraordinary. The square itself is photogenic.

activities.title: Return to Kathmandu and Farewell Dinner at Newa Chhon
activities.description: Traditional Newari tasting meals in a quiet heritage setting — the perfect ending to a food-focused trip.

activities.title: Evening Walk Along the Kathmandu Nightlife Strip
activities.description: Thamel transforms at night — live music drifts from multiple bars. Have a drink and plan the rest of the trip.

activities.title: Sadhus and Ghat Walk at Pashupatinath
activities.description: Walk the riverside ghats — observe cremation rituals with respectful distance, chat with sadhus, and watch the river life.

activities.title: Rooftop Lunch at Stupa View Restaurant
activities.description: Eat with a direct eye-level view of the stupa — try the Tibetan noodle soup and butter tea.

activities.title: Nyatapola Pagoda at Taumadhi Square
activities.description: Nepal's tallest and best-preserved pagoda — count the 108 steps between the carved guardian wrestlers.

activities.title: Pottery Square Wheel-Throwing Experience
activities.description: Watch traditional potters and try your hand at the wheel — the potters are friendly and give you a go for a small tip.

activities.title: Evening Return and Dinner at Local Thamel Restaurant
activities.description: Wind down after the day trip with a hearty dal bhat or Tibetan thugpa back in Thamel.

activities.title: Himalayan Sunrise at Nagarkot Viewpoint
activities.description: Panoramic Himalayan sunrise — Everest, Langtang, and the Annapurnas visible on a clear October morning.

activities.title: Village Lunch Near Changu Narayan
activities.description: Simple local dal bhat at a family kitchen in the village — authentic and cheap.

activities.title: Thamel Pashmina and Souvenir Shopping
activities.description: Stock up on pashmina shawls, thangka paintings, singing bowls, and lokta paper notebooks — bargain politely.

activities.title: Final Momo Lunch at Momo Star Thamel
activities.description: A classic for a reason — perfectly steamed buff momos with a fiery sesame-chilli sauce.

activities.title: Heritage Hotel Welcome Tour and Check-In
activities.description: The hotel manager personally walks you through the courtyards — over 50 years of reclaimed Newari art and architecture.

activities.title: Sunset Cocktails at the Heritage Bar
activities.description: The finest bar in Kathmandu — Himalayan-inspired cocktails served in a candlelit Newari courtyard.

activities.title: Private Breakfast on the Heritage Terrace
activities.description: Return to a full Nepali and continental breakfast served in the carved-stone courtyard with morning light.

activities.title: Private Lunch at Café du Temple Patan
activities.description: French-Nepali fusion on a rooftop overlooking Patan's ancient temples — reserve the private table.

activities.title: Evening Champagne at Garden of Dreams
activities.description: Reserve the pavilion for a private champagne sundowner — the most romantic garden in the Himalayan region.

activities.title: Private Pottery Masterclass at Pottery Square
activities.description: One-on-one session with the square's master potter — create your own pot and have it fired.

activities.title: Return Transfer and Full Panchakarma Spa at Dwarika's
activities.description: Traditional Ayurvedic detox — herbal steam, Abhyanga full-body oil massage, and Shirodhara treatment.

activities.title: Private In-Room Dining by Chef's Table Request
activities.description: A bespoke Newari menu prepared by the executive chef — served privately in your heritage suite.

activities.title: Last-Minute Premium Shopping at Mahaguthi Craft Shop
activities.description: Fair-trade cooperative shop — the finest quality pashmina, hand-knotted carpets, and bronze at fixed honest prices.

activities.title: VIP Airport Transfer and Departure
activities.description: Private premium vehicle to the airport — the hotel will arrange expedited check-in assistance.

activities.title: Free Walking Tour from Thamel
activities.description: Multiple free walking tours depart Thamel daily — tip-based, led by knowledgeable local guides.

activities.title: Free Morning Kora at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: Walk the circumambulation path for free — only pay NPR 400 if you want to enter the stupa platform itself.

activities.title: Pashupatinath Entry and Ghat Walk
activities.description: The NPR 1000 entry fee for foreigners is steep, but the experience of the ghats, sadhus, and river is unmissable.

activities.title: NPR 200 Dal Bhat Dinner at Backpacker Bhatti
activities.description: Ask your guesthouse owner for the cheapest real-food spot near you — every neighborhood has one.

activities.title: Indra Chowk Bead Market Browse
activities.description: The famous bead and textile market — colorful glass and Tibetan beads, prayer beads, and handmade jewelry.

activities.title: Farewell Nepali Thali at Thakali Bhanchhaghar
activities.description: Classic Thakali home-style cooking — dal bhat with multiple curries, gundruk, and unlimited rice.

activities.title: Natural History Museum Interactive Exhibits
activities.description: Minerals, butterflies, and Himalayan wildlife displays — great for kids after the stupa.

activities.title: Garden of Dreams Afternoon Play
activities.description: The neoclassical garden is perfect for family downtime — kids can run around the fountains and lawns.

activities.title: Early Morning Drive to Bhaktapur
activities.description: Beat the tourist crowds with a 9 AM start — the 55-window palace and Nyatapola pagoda are magical before midday.

activities.title: Juju Dhau Family Treat — King Curd Tasting
activities.description: Nepal's most famous yoghurt served in clay pots at Taumadhi — kids and adults both love the creamy sweetness.

activities.title: Return to Kathmandu and Momo Dinner
activities.description: Momo is universally loved — pick a busy Thamel momo spot and order a big family platter to share.

activities.title: Pashmina and Souvenir Shopping at Mahaguthi
activities.description: Fair-trade, quality-certified shop — pashminas, singing bowls, and thangkas at honest prices.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Sacred Kora at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: Walk the circumambulation path as part of a morning meditation practice — the silence at 5 AM is profound.

activities.title: Vegetarian Lunch at the Monastery Kitchen
activities.description: Simple, wholesome vegetarian meal served in the monastery's communal dining hall — completely peaceful.

activities.title: Evening Incense Ceremony at Boudhanath
activities.description: Return for the evening butter lamp lighting ceremony — hundreds of lamps flicker around the great stupa.

activities.title: Yoga Session at Yoga Studio Thamel
activities.description: Many Thamel yoga studios offer walk-in morning classes — hatha or kundalini to center the body after early starts.

activities.title: Light Vegetarian Lunch Before Dakshinkali
activities.description: Eat light before visiting the Kali temple — local vegetarian thali near Ratnapark.

activities.title: Sunrise Circumambulation at Swayambhunath
activities.description: Final morning — join monks in their early circumambulation as the prayer flags flutter in the morning breeze.

activities.title: Silent Lunch at Newa Chhon
activities.description: Traditional Newari meals in a quiet heritage setting — the perfect mindful lunch.

activities.title: Quiet Farewell Dinner at OR2K
activities.description: End with a vegetarian meal at this calm, dimly lit cafe near Boudhanath — the sesame noodles are outstanding.

activities.title: Arrival and Lakeside Guesthouse Check-In
activities.description: Budget guesthouses line the Lakeside strip — NPR 500–800 gets a clean room with Phewa Lake views.

activities.title: Free Lakeside Promenade Walk
activities.description: Walk the full length of the lakeside promenade — boats, mountains, cafes, and paragliders overhead.

activities.title: Lakeside Street Food Dinner
activities.description: Sekuwa (grilled meat skewers), momo, and fresh guava juice along the lakeside promenade.

activities.title: Sarangkot Village Breakfast with Local Family
activities.description: Stop at a simple village teahouse for dal bhat or beaten rice — NPR 150 and you get the authentic experience.

activities.title: Sunset and Panoramic Views from the Stupa
activities.description: Stay for sunset — the stupa turns orange and the lake glows below. One of the best free views in Pokhara.

activities.title: Davis Falls Thundering Waterfall
activities.description: The water disappears underground through a narrow slot — most dramatic during monsoon season.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Lunch at Lakeside Local Restaurant
activities.description: Step off the tourist strip one block — find a local bhatti and eat unlimited dal bhat for NPR 200.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at Moondance Restaurant Lakeside
activities.description: Best value restaurant on Lakeside — Nepali and continental food, generous portions, great people watching.

activities.title: Gear Check and Rental at Lakeside Shops
activities.description: Rent missing items — sleeping bag NPR 100/day, down jacket NPR 150/day, trekking poles NPR 100/day.

activities.title: Sarangkot Afternoon Acclimatization Walk
activities.description: Warm up the legs with the 1.5-hour walk up to Sarangkot — check your gear and test your boots.

activities.title: Route Planning and Map Study at Cafe
activities.description: Spread the topo map out at a lakeside cafe — study the Poon Hill route and confirm logistics.

activities.title: Early Breakfast and Hotel Checkout
activities.description: Light breakfast before the long day — boiled eggs, toast, and Nepali chiya at the guesthouse.

activities.title: Jeep Ride to Nayapul Trailhead
activities.description: 1.5-hour jeep from Lakeside to the trek starting point — enjoy your last comfortable vehicle for a few days.

activities.title: Teahouse Dal Bhat Lunch at Tikhedhunga
activities.description: Stop at the classic teahouse — unlimited dal bhat cooked fresh. Rest your legs for 30 minutes.

activities.title: Ulleri Stone Steps Climb — 3000 Steps
activities.description: The famous stone staircase — 3000 steps straight up through the rhododendron forest. Brutal but beautiful.

activities.title: Sunset Views of Dhaulagiri from Ghorepani
activities.description: Walk 10 minutes above the village at sunset — the 8167m Dhaulagiri turns orange and then pink.

activities.title: Most Famous Himalayan Sunrise in Nepal at Poon Hill
activities.description: The entire Annapurna range, Dhaulagiri, and Machhapuchhre (Fishtail) turn crimson one by one at dawn.

activities.title: Tadapani to Ghandruk Descent
activities.description: Descend through oak and chestnut forests to the large Gurung village of Ghandruk — incredible Annapurna South views.

activities.title: Descent from Ghandruk to Nayapul
activities.description: 3-hour descent through terraced farmland back to Nayapul — the legs feel the 4 days but the spirit soars.

activities.title: Jeep Return from Nayapul to Pokhara
activities.description: Share a local jeep back — NPR 300 per seat. Arrive back on Lakeside triumphant.

activities.title: Hot Shower and Rest at Guesthouse
activities.description: The best shower of your life — take your time, wash off 4 days of trail dust.

activities.title: Celebration Dinner and Cold Beer at Busy Bee Cafe
activities.description: Well-earned pizza and ice-cold Everest beer after 4 days on the Annapurna trail.

activities.title: Free Walk Back Down Through Sarangkot Village
activities.description: Take the village path down — small tea stalls, children heading to school, and terraced fields.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple Visit
activities.description: Row to the island — pay NPR 20 for the small boat across. The temple is peaceful and the views back are great.

activities.title: NPR 200 Dal Bhat Dinner at Local Bhatti
activities.description: Walk one street back from the tourist strip — local bhattis serve unlimited dal bhat for NPR 200.

activities.title: Davis Falls Free Viewpoint
activities.description: Walk around to the free outside viewpoint — skip the paid entrance and still see the falls clearly from above.

activities.title: NPR 150 Street Momo Lunch at Mahendra Pool
activities.description: Local street stalls near Mahendra Pool — 10 steamed momos for NPR 100, chilli sauce included.

activities.title: Sunset Walk Along the Full Lakeside Promenade
activities.description: Walk the full 3 km strip — paragliders landing, boats returning, mountains reflected in the still lake water.

activities.title: Free Lakeside Bazaar Browse
activities.description: Window-shop the gear stores, book exchanges, and handicraft stalls — you can buy a used novel for NPR 100.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Farewell Lunch at Busy Street Stall
activities.description: Final meal at the cheapest, most local spot you can find — the food is exactly the same as the tourist restaurants.

activities.title: Private Boat Transfer to Fishtail Lodge
activities.description: Cross Phewa Lake by private boat to Nepal's most romantic lakeside lodge — only accessible by water.

activities.title: Welcome Cocktails on the Lodge Terrace
activities.description: Machhapuchhre (Fishtail Mountain) reflecting in the lake — aperol spritz while your bags are unpacked.

activities.title: Sunset Wine on the Private Lake Deck
activities.description: The lodge's private deck facing Machhapuchhre — watch the mountain turn pink with a glass of Nepali wine.

activities.title: Premium Tandem Paragliding with GoPro Video
activities.description: 45-minute premium flight with full GoPro coverage over Phewa Lake — relive it forever.

activities.title: Couples Spa at Fishtail Lodge
activities.description: Side-by-side stone massage with Himalayan herbs — overlooking the lake through floor-to-ceiling windows.

activities.title: Morning Yoga on the Lodge Terrace
activities.description: Sunrise yoga session with the lodge's instructor — the lake mist rises behind Machhapuchhre as you stretch.

activities.title: Lakeside Boutique Shopping for Souvenirs
activities.description: Pick up handmade jewelry, Nepali wool scarves, and pashmina wraps from the curated Lakeside boutiques.

activities.title: Sundowner on the Lakeside Rooftop Bar
activities.description: Final evening cocktails with Annapurna reflections in the lake — the perfect last image of Pokhara.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at Caffe Concerto
activities.description: Finest Italian in Nepal — risotto, tiramisu, and a bottle of Chilean wine to close the trip.

activities.title: Late Breakfast at Busy Bee Cafe
activities.description: Best brunch in Pokhara — eggs benedict, fresh juice, and the warmest service on Lakeside.

activities.title: Last Lakeside Coffee and Goodbye Walk
activities.description: A final slow coffee at a lakeside cafe — watch the boats, the mountains, and let Pokhara sink in one last time.

activities.title: Arrival and Thamel Check-In
activities.description: Settle into a Thamel guesthouse — mid-range options run NPR 1500–2500 with breakfast.

activities.title: Thamel Night Market and Street Food
activities.description: Thamel at night is electric — street food, live music from bars, and the neon glow of gear shops.

activities.title: Pashupatinath Sacred Site Visit
activities.description: The most important Hindu temple in Nepal — ghats, sadhus, and the powerful energy of the Bagmati River.

activities.title: Patan Museum and Durbar Square
activities.description: Cross the river to Lalitpur — Nepal's finest concentration of Newari architecture and the best museum in the country.

activities.title: Nyatapola Temple Climb and Juju Dhau
activities.description: Nepal's tallest pagoda followed by clay-pot yoghurt — the definitive Bhaktapur experience.

activities.title: Dattatreya Square Evening Walk
activities.description: The quieter eastern square — peacock window, Bhimsen Temple, and almost no tourists at 4 PM.

activities.title: Light Dal Bhat Dinner Before Early Bus
activities.description: Early night — bus leaves at 7 AM so eat early and rest well.

activities.title: Lakeside Arrival and Guesthouse Check-In
activities.description: Check into a Lakeside guesthouse — drop the bags, wash up, and head straight to the promenade.

activities.title: Sunset Rowboat on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Rent a wooden rowboat for one hour and drift toward the Annapurna reflection in the golden light.

activities.title: Tandem Paragliding from Sarangkot
activities.description: Fly from the launch site to Lakeside — 20 minutes of thermal soaring above Phewa Lake with the Annapurnas behind you.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Hike and Lake View
activities.description: Afternoon hike through forest to the stupa — both the lake and the mountains are visible from the top.

activities.title: Lakeside Promenade Sunset Walk
activities.description: Golden hour along the promenade — paragliders landing, boats coming in, and the mountains turning pink.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner in Pokhara
activities.description: Celebrate the completion of your Annapurna adventure with a special farewell dinner at a lakeside restaurant.

activities.title: Boutique Shopping in Lakeside
activities.description: Explore the upscale boutiques and art galleries along Lakeside Road, perfect for unique souvenirs and gifts.

activities.title: Sunset Cruise with Drinks
activities.description: Embark on a private sunset cruise on Phewa Lake, enjoying complimentary drinks and the stunning evening hues.

activities.title: Explore Seti River Gorge
activities.description: Witness the incredible natural phenomenon of the Seti River carving a deep, narrow gorge through the city.

activities.title: Souvenir Shopping (optional)
activities.description: Grab some last-minute souvenirs or gifts from the local market before heading to the airport.

activities.title: Transfer to Pokhara Airport
activities.description: Transfer to Pokhara Airport for your onward journey, concluding your memorable Annapurna trip.

activities.title: Local Dal Bhat Lunch at Begnas Village
activities.description: Eat at a family kitchen near the lake — the freshest vegetables from their garden, cooked over wood fire.

activities.title: Lakeside Souvenir Shopping
activities.description: Handmade jewelry, thangka prints, Tibetan singing bowls, and trekking maps for home.

activities.title: Grand Tour Farewell Dinner at Caffe Concerto
activities.description: Close the Nepal trip with the best meal in Pokhara — pasta, tiramisu, and a glass of wine.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple Last Visit
activities.description: Row to the island one last time — light a butter lamp and say goodbye to Machhapuchhre.

activities.title: Lakeside Last Walk and Packing
activities.description: Pack carefully, leave tips for the guesthouse staff, and take one last look at the lake.

activities.title: Transfer to Pokhara Airport
activities.description: Transfer to Pokhara Airport for your onward journey, concluding your memorable Annapurna trip.

activities.title: Visit Gurkha Memorial Museum
activities.description: Learn about the valiant history and contributions of the Gurkha soldiers at this dedicated museum.

activities.title: Drive to Begnas Lake
activities.description: Take a scenic drive to Begnas Lake, a quieter and less commercialized lake perfect for relaxation.

activities.title: Boating & Fishing at Begnas Lake
activities.description: Enjoy a peaceful private boat ride on Begnas Lake, with an option for some recreational fishing.

activities.title: Explore Rupa Lake Viewpoint
activities.description: Visit a viewpoint overlooking Rupa Lake, another beautiful and tranquil lake in the Pokhara Valley.

activities.title: Visit Pumdikot Shiva Statue
activities.description: Drive to Pumdikot to see the grand statue of Lord Shiva, offering panoramic views of the Annapurna range and Pokhara Valley.

activities.title: Visit Bat Cave (Chameri Gupha)
activities.description: Explore the intriguing Bat Cave, a natural habitat for thousands of bats, offering a unique caving experience.

activities.title: Sunset Drinks at a Hillside Bar
activities.description: Enjoy cocktails at a bar perched on a hillside, offering spectacular sunset views over the lakes and surrounding hills.
activities.location: The Begnas Lake Resort & Villas Bar

activities.title: Post-Adventure Relaxation
activities.description: Return to your resort for some well-deserved relaxation by your private pool or in a quiet corner.

activities.title: Dinner at a Lakeside Pizzeria
activities.description: Enjoy a casual yet elegant dinner at a popular lakeside pizzeria, known for its delicious wood-fired pizzas and vibrant atmosphere.

activities.title: Visit Regional Museum
activities.description: Explore the Regional Museum to gain insights into the history, culture, and ethnic groups of the Pokhara region.

activities.title: Lakeside Stroll & Coffee
activities.description: Enjoy a leisurely stroll along the Phewa Lake promenade, stopping for a gourmet coffee at a chic cafe.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Boating & Tal Barahi Temple
activities.description: Enjoy a serene boat ride on Phewa Lake, visiting the island temple of Tal Barahi.

activities.title: Sunrise at Sarangkot Viewpoint
activities.description: Drive to Sarangkot early in the morning to witness a spectacular sunrise over the Annapurna and Dhaulagiri mountain ranges.

activities.title: Visit Devi's Fall and Gupteshwor Cave
activities.description: Explore the intriguing Devi's Fall, a unique waterfall, and the sacred Gupteshwor Cave located directly opposite.

activities.title: Evening Walk and Shopping in Lakeside
activities.description: Enjoy a leisurely stroll along Lakeside Road, browsing local shops for souvenirs and handicrafts.

activities.title: Trek from Nayapul to Hille/Tikhedhunga
activities.description: Begin your trek, following the Modi Khola river to the villages of Hille and Tikhedhunga, enjoying the rural scenery.

activities.title: Ascend the Ulleri Staircase
activities.description: Challenge yourself with the famous stone staircase leading up to the large Magar village of Ulleri, offering initial mountain views.

activities.title: Trek through Rhododendron Forests
activities.description: Continue your ascent through lush rhododendron and oak forests, enjoying the fresh mountain air and natural beauty.

activities.title: Arrival in Ghorepani
activities.description: Reach Ghorepani, a bustling village offering magnificent views of the Annapurna and Dhaulagiri ranges.

activities.title: Evening Views and Acclimatization
activities.description: Take an evening walk to a nearby viewpoint in Ghorepani to admire the sunset colors on the Himalayas and acclimatize.

activities.title: Breakfast in Ghorepani
activities.description: Return to Ghorepani for a well-deserved breakfast after the memorable sunrise experience.

activities.title: Trek to Tadapani
activities.description: Begin your descent through beautiful forests, crossing streams and enjoying distant mountain views en route to Tadapani.

activities.title: Trek to Ghandruk
activities.description: Descend through terraced fields and traditional villages to reach Ghandruk, a large and picturesque Gurung village.

activities.title: Explore Ghandruk Village Center
activities.description: Wander through the charming stone houses and narrow alleys of Ghandruk, observing the local way of life.

activities.title: Traditional Gurung Dinner & Lodge Stay
activities.description: Enjoy an authentic Gurung dinner and spend the night in a comfortable lodge within the village.

activities.title: Drive from Syauli Bazar to Pokhara
activities.description: Take a jeep or bus from Syauli Bazar back to Pokhara, enjoying the changing landscapes.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Boating & Tal Barahi Temple
activities.description: Enjoy a serene boat ride on Phewa Lake, visiting the island temple of Tal Barahi.

activities.title: Lakeside Dinner Experience
activities.description: Savor a delightful dinner at a popular restaurant along the vibrant Lakeside promenade, enjoying the evening ambiance.

activities.title: Sunrise at Sarangkot Viewpoint
activities.description: Drive to Sarangkot early in the morning to witness a spectacular sunrise over the Annapurna and Dhaulagiri mountain ranges.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum
activities.description: Learn about the history of mountaineering and the diverse cultures of the Himalayan people at this informative museum.

activities.title: Relaxation at Lakeside Hotel
activities.description: Check back into a comfortable hotel in Pokhara and enjoy some well-deserved rest after your trek.

activities.title: Drive to Nayapul and Trek Start
activities.description: Take a scenic drive from Pokhara to Nayapul, the starting point of your Annapurna trek.

activities.title: Trek from Nayapul to Hille/Tikhedhunga
activities.description: Begin your trek, following the Modi Khola river to the villages of Hille and Tikhedhunga, enjoying the rural scenery.

activities.title: Overnight Stay in Ulleri
activities.description: Check into a traditional teahouse in Ulleri, enjoy a local dinner, and prepare for the next day's trek.

activities.title: Trek through Rhododendron Forests
activities.description: Continue your ascent through lush rhododendron and oak forests, enjoying the fresh mountain air and natural beauty.

activities.title: Arrival in Ghorepani
activities.description: Reach Ghorepani, a bustling village offering magnificent views of the Annapurna and Dhaulagiri ranges.

activities.title: Evening Views and Acclimatization
activities.description: Take an evening walk to a nearby viewpoint in Ghorepani to admire the sunset colors on the Himalayas and acclimatize.

activities.title: Breakfast in Ghorepani
activities.description: Return to Ghorepani for a well-deserved breakfast after the memorable sunrise experience.

activities.title: Trek to Tadapani
activities.description: Begin your descent through beautiful forests, crossing streams and enjoying distant mountain views en route to Tadapani.

activities.title: Trek to Ghandruk
activities.description: Descend through terraced fields and traditional villages to reach Ghandruk, a large and picturesque Gurung village.

activities.title: Visit the Gurung Museum
activities.description: Discover the rich history, traditions, and artifacts of the Gurung community at the local museum.

activities.title: Traditional Gurung Dinner & Lodge Stay
activities.description: Enjoy an authentic Gurung dinner and spend the night in a comfortable lodge within the village.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner in Pokhara
activities.description: Celebrate the completion of your Annapurna adventure with a special farewell dinner at a lakeside restaurant.

activities.title: Luxury Airport Transfer & Check-in
activities.description: Arrive at Pokhara International Airport and enjoy a private luxury transfer to your exquisite resort, nestled in the serene hills.
activities.location: Pokhara International Airport to The Pavilions Himalayas

activities.title: Resort Orientation & Relaxation
activities.description: Settle into your luxurious villa, explore the resort's amenities, and unwind by the infinity pool with panoramic views.

activities.title: Gourmet Welcome Dinner
activities.description: Savor a farm-to-table gourmet dinner featuring organic ingredients from the resort's own farm, paired with fine wines.
activities.location: The Farmhouse Restaurant, The Pavilions Himalayas

activities.title: Private Boating on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Enjoy a serene private boat ride on the tranquil waters of Phewa Lake, absorbing the majestic reflections of the Annapurna range.

activities.title: Luxury Lakeside Dining
activities.description: Indulge in a exquisite lunch at a premier lakeside restaurant, offering stunning views and a sophisticated menu.

activities.title: Luxury Paragliding Experience
activities.description: Soar above Pokhara valley with a private paragliding flight, offering breathtaking aerial views of the lakes and mountains.

activities.title: Discover Gupteshwor Cave
activities.description: Delve into the sacred Gupteshwor Cave, an ancient cave featuring a shrine dedicated to Lord Shiva, located near Devi's Fall.

activities.title: Fine Dining at a Rooftop Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy an exquisite dinner at a renowned rooftop restaurant in Lakeside, offering a vibrant ambiance and international cuisine.

activities.title: Breakfast with a View
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful breakfast at a scenic restaurant in Sarangkot, savoring the fresh mountain air and panoramic views.

activities.title: Visit World Peace Pagoda
activities.description: Hike or drive to the majestic World Peace Pagoda, offering serene surroundings and breathtaking views of Pokhara Valley and Phewa Lake.

activities.title: Nepali Cooking Class
activities.description: Participate in a private cooking class to learn the secrets of authentic Nepali cuisine, using fresh local ingredients.

activities.title: Private Dinner at a Hidden Gem
activities.description: Experience a private dinner at an exclusive, hidden restaurant known for its intimate ambiance and gourmet dishes.

activities.title: Visit Bindhyabasini Temple
activities.description: Pay homage at the Bindhyabasini Temple, one of Pokhara's oldest and most revered Hindu temples.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum
activities.description: Discover the history of mountaineering and the diverse cultures of the Himalayan region at this comprehensive museum.

activities.title: Art Gallery Visit
activities.description: Visit a local art gallery to admire contemporary Nepali artworks and traditional thangka paintings.

activities.title: Leisurely Brunch
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious and healthy brunch at a popular Lakeside restaurant known for its international menu and relaxed atmosphere.

activities.title: Luxury Farewell Dinner
activities.description: Enjoy a spectacular farewell dinner at the iconic Fishtail Lodge, accessible by boat, offering an unforgettable dining experience.

activities.title: Craft Beer Tasting at Himalayan Brewery
activities.description: Nepal's growing craft beer scene — try the Himalayan Red Ale and the seasonal wheat beer.

activities.title: 22-Course Dinner at Krishnarpan
activities.description: Nepal's most celebrated tasting menu inside Dwarika's — authentic regional dishes from across the country, served on copper platters.

activities.title: Asan Morning Market Snack Crawl
activities.description: Pani puri, chatpate, and freshly made sel roti at the morning market. Arrive by 9 AM for peak atmosphere.

activities.title: Full Hands-On Cooking Class with Puskar
activities.description: 3-hour session — learn to cook dal bhat, gundruk soup, and aloo tama in a traditional kitchen. You eat everything at the end.

activities.title: Spice Shopping at New Road Market
activities.description: Stock up on timur (Szechuan pepper), jimbu, and dried lapsi — the core spices of Nepali cooking.

activities.title: Late Street Food Dinner at Thamel Chowk
activities.description: The night stalls fire up after dark — sekuwa (grilled meat skewers), chatpate, and fresh juice.

activities.title: Juju Dhau Pilgrimage to Bhaktapur
activities.description: The 30-minute drive to taste Bhaktapur's famous king curd — served only in clay pots, never to-go.

activities.title: Explore the Narrow Lanes of Bhaktapur Old Town
activities.description: Get lost in the medieval alleys — traditional Newari houses, hidden courtyards, and wood-carved windows around every turn.

activities.title: Afternoon Snack: Bara and Samay Baji at Taumadhi
activities.description: Authentic Newari snack plate — bara, beaten rice, egg, and achar, eaten at wooden tables in the shadow of Nyatapola Temple.

activities.title: Airport Arrival and Hotel Check-In
activities.description: Private taxi from TIA to Thamel — agree the price before getting in (NPR 700–900 to most Thamel hotels).

activities.title: Thamel Orientation Walk
activities.description: Get your bearings — bookshops, gear stores, and street food stalls all within the compact tourist hub.

activities.title: Rooftop Sunset Views Over Thamel
activities.description: Most guesthouses have a rooftop — grab a tea and watch the valley lights come on as the sun drops.

activities.title: Welcome Dinner at Weizen Bräu
activities.description: Kathmandu's best microbrewery — lager brewed on-site, wood-fired pizza, and a warm crowd of travellers.

activities.title: Morning Aarti at Pashupatinath Temple
activities.description: Arrive at 6 AM to witness the sacred ritual on the Bagmati ghats — butter lamps, sacred ash, and chanting priests.

activities.title: Morning Kora at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: Join pilgrims on the morning circumambulation — prayer wheels spinning, incense drifting, butter lamps just lit.

activities.title: Thangka Art Exploration at Boudha Studios
activities.description: The lanes around the stupa are full of thangka masters — watch the painstaking gold-detail work up close.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Afternoon Visit
activities.description: The peaceful hilltop monastery above Boudha — resident monk guide explains Tibetan Buddhist practice.

activities.title: Bhaktapur Full Day Heritage Tour — Durbar Square
activities.description: Hire a local guide for the full Bhaktapur circuit — start at Durbar Square with the 55-window palace and Lion Gate.

activities.title: King Curd Tasting — Juju Dhau in Clay Pots
activities.description: World-famous yoghurt served only in Bhaktapur — sweet, thick, and eaten at the stall.

activities.title: Dattatreya Square and Peacock Window Photography
activities.description: The finest example of Newari woodcarving in Nepal — the peacock window alone is worth the Bhaktapur entry fee.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Drive to Nagarkot
activities.description: Hire a private taxi the night before and drive up in the dark — arrive 30 min before sunrise for the best position.

activities.title: Nagarkot to Changu Narayan Ridge Hike
activities.description: 2.5-hour ridge hike through pine and rhododendron forest to Nepal's oldest temple. The trail is well-marked.

activities.title: Changu Narayan UNESCO Temple Visit
activities.description: Nepal's oldest surviving temple — extraordinary stone and wood carvings of Vishnu spanning 1500 years of art history.

activities.title: Taxi Back to Kathmandu and Evening Rest
activities.description: Recover at the hotel before heading out for a final shopping or rooftop evening.

activities.title: Peaceful Morning at Garden of Dreams
activities.description: Neoclassical garden oasis in the heart of Kathmandu — fountains, pavilions, and bougainvillea. Perfect final morning.

activities.title: Last Stop at Swayambhunath for Reflection
activities.description: A short climb for a final view of the city before heading home — the all-seeing eyes of Buddha watch your departure.

activities.title: Freak Street and Old Kathmandu Lanes Wander
activities.description: The original hippie trail — walk the old Basantapur lanes, peek into temple courtyards, watch street life.

activities.title: Airport Transfer and Departure
activities.description: Allow 2.5 hours before departure — Kathmandu traffic can be unpredictable, especially in the late afternoon.

activities.title: VIP Airport Transfer to Dwarika's Hotel
activities.description: Private transfer in a premium vehicle to the only five-star heritage boutique hotel in Kathmandu.

activities.title: Private Dwarika's Spa Welcome Treatment
activities.description: 60-minute herbal oil foot massage with locally sourced botanical ingredients — a perfect arrival ritual.

activities.title: Krishnarpan 22-Course Nepali Tasting Dinner
activities.description: Unparalleled Nepali haute cuisine — Nepal's most celebrated dining experience, served on copper and brass with a dedicated wait staff.

activities.title: Himalayan Panorama Mountain Flight
activities.description: One-hour scenic flight past Everest, Kanchenjunga, and the Annapurnas — champagne served at cruising altitude.

activities.title: Exclusive After-Hours Patan Museum Curator Tour
activities.description: Private guided tour arranged for hotel guests — Nepal's finest bronze and stone art explained by the museum's senior curator.

activities.title: Golden Temple and Hidden Courtyards Private Walk
activities.description: Private guide leads you through Patan's most hidden religious sites — places most tourists never find.

activities.title: Private Bhaktapur UNESCO Heritage Tour
activities.description: Expert art historian guide for a private deep-dive into Newari civilization — all three squares, all day.

activities.title: Premium Juju Dhau and Newari Lunch at Peaceful Garden
activities.description: Arranged private Newari lunch in a heritage courtyard — samay baji, bara, aloo tama, and the famous king curd.

activities.title: Private Dattatreya Woodcarving Heritage Walk
activities.description: Exclusive access to the Woodcarving Museum with the curator — the peacock window's full history explained.

activities.title: Sunrise Yoga on the Heritage Rooftop
activities.description: Private yoga session with the hotel's resident instructor as the Himalayas light up at dawn.

activities.title: Farewell Heritage Breakfast
activities.description: Final morning in the carved-stone courtyard — honey, fresh fruit, and Nepali tea before checkout.

activities.title: Final Stroll Through Patan Durbar Square
activities.description: If the flight allows time — a last look at the finest Newari square in Nepal before the private transfer.

activities.title: Free Stupa Walk at Swayambhunath via Back Route
activities.description: Skip the main staircase and use the back path — it's free and far less crowded at sunrise.

activities.title: NPR 20 Chiya and Puri at Asan
activities.description: Cheapest tea in Kathmandu — pull up a plastic stool among market vendors and watch the city wake up.

activities.title: NPR 250 Unlimited Dal Bhat Lunch
activities.description: Find any local bhatti (eatery) — unlimited rice, dal, vegetables, and achar for under NPR 300.

activities.title: Sunset at Garden of Dreams on a Budget
activities.description: The NPR 400 entry fee is the best value in Kathmandu — read, rest, and escape the city chaos.

activities.title: Cheapest Breakfast: Tibetan Bread at Boudha
activities.description: NPR 80 for fresh Tibetan bread and butter tea from the stalls surrounding the stupa.

activities.title: Thangka Studio Visits Around the Stupa
activities.description: Spend an hour browsing the studios — artists are happy to explain the iconography with no pressure to buy.

activities.title: Evening Aarti from the Free Riverside Viewpoint
activities.description: Cross the bridge and watch the evening fire ritual from the east bank — completely free from this angle.

activities.title: Durbar Square Before the Crowds at Dawn
activities.description: Arrive at 7 AM — the ancient square is almost empty, the light is golden, and the atmosphere is extraordinary.

activities.title: Kumari Courtyard and Palace Wander
activities.description: Spend time inside Hanuman Dhoka — the living goddess Kumari occasionally appears at her window in the morning.

activities.title: Self-Guided Walk Through Asan to Kimdol
activities.description: Follow the old trade route west through Asan, Kimdol, and Chhetrapati — the real Kathmandu that tourists miss.

activities.title: Relaxing Afternoon and Departure Prep
activities.description: Pack, pick up any last items, and rest before the evening bus or early morning flight.

activities.title: Monkey Temple Adventure at Swayambhunath
activities.description: Kids love the resident monkeys — count the 365 steps, spot the stupa's all-seeing eyes, and feed the monkeys (from a distance).

activities.title: Pizza Lunch at Fire and Ice
activities.description: Kathmandu's most famous pizzeria — wood-fired Neapolitan style. Kids eat free on weekends.

activities.title: Thamel Ice Cream and Evening Stroll
activities.description: Multiple ice cream shops line the Thamel alleys — mango kulfi and local flavors from the street vendors.

activities.title: Family Dal Bhat Dinner at Bhojan Griha
activities.description: Set in a 150-year-old heritage home — live traditional music, folk dancers, and a classic Nepali set menu for the whole family.

activities.title: Pottery Lesson for Kids at Pottery Square
activities.description: Children can try spinning the potter's wheel under gentle guidance from a master — a favorite activity for all ages.

activities.title: Nyatapola Temple Step Counting Challenge
activities.description: Turn it into a game — count all 108 steps with the kids and spot the five pairs of guardians that get stronger at each level.

activities.title: Dattatreya Square Woodcarving Wonder
activities.description: Kids are always amazed by the intricate peacock window — explain the 500 years of craft that went into it.

activities.title: Kite Flying at Tundikhel
activities.description: Kathmandu's great open ground — locals fly kites here on winter weekends. Buy a kite for NPR 50 from a nearby stall.

activities.title: Indra Chowk Bead Market — Kids' Jewelry Hunt
activities.description: Let kids pick out their own bead necklaces and bracelets — the colorful glass beads are irresistible.

activities.title: Final Farewell Nepali Lunch at Thakali Kitchen
activities.description: Last dal bhat together — unlimited refills, three curries, and the best way to end a Nepal trip.

activities.title: Swayambhunath Final Climb and Goodbye
activities.description: Return for a final climb with the whole family — the stupa's eyes watching over your departure.

activities.title: Butter Lamp Offering and Sitting Meditation
activities.description: Light a butter lamp in front of the stupa shrine — sit quietly as pilgrims pass and the incense drifts.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Guided Dharma Tour
activities.description: Visit this famous Tibetan Buddhist monastery — resident monk takes you through the prayer hall, gardens, and library.

activities.title: 2-Hour Guided Meditation at Himalayan Buddhist Center
activities.description: Structured guided meditation session open to visitors — suitable for complete beginners.

activities.title: Sacred Dawn Rituals at Pashupatinath Temple
activities.description: Arrive at 5:30 AM for the morning abhishek — the most sacred Hindu ritual in Nepal, performed on the Bagmati ghats.

activities.title: Sadhu Conversation at the Ghats
activities.description: Approach the sadhus respectfully — many speak English and share fascinating spiritual perspectives on life and renunciation.

activities.title: Dakshinkali Kali Temple Visit — Southern Valley
activities.description: Important Kali temple at the southern edge of the valley — the atmosphere is powerful, especially on Tuesdays and Saturdays.

activities.title: Pharping Monastery Cave Meditation Spot
activities.description: On the return from Dakshinkali, stop at Pharping — ancient Buddhist caves where Padmasambhava is said to have meditated.

activities.title: Peaceful Breakfast at Swayambhu Base Cafe
activities.description: One of the small cafes at the stupa base — fresh bread, eggs, and Nepali chiya while monks pass.

activities.title: Afternoon Writing and Journaling at Garden of Dreams
activities.description: The perfect place to process three intense spiritual days — bring a journal and sit among the fountains.

activities.title: Final Singing Bowl Shopping at Thamel
activities.description: Take home a hand-hammered singing bowl — the bronze resonance will bring Kathmandu back whenever you play it.

activities.title: Afternoon Swim at Phewa Lake Beach
activities.description: The small sandy beaches on the north end of the lake are free — locals and backpackers swim here all afternoon.

activities.title: Sunset Rowboat on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Rent a wooden rowboat — NPR 400/hour — and drift toward the Annapurna reflection as the sun drops.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Temple Island Visit by Boat
activities.description: The small island temple in the middle of Phewa Lake — row or take a small boat for NPR 20.

activities.title: Shared Jeep to Sarangkot for Sunrise
activities.description: Share a jeep from Lakeside for NPR 300 — the Annapurna range at dawn is the best free show in Nepal.

activities.title: Watch Paragliders Launch from Sarangkot
activities.description: Even if you're not flying, watching pilots launch into the thermals above Phewa Lake is spectacular.

activities.title: Budget Tandem Paragliding Flight
activities.description: NPR 3000–4000 for a 20-minute tandem flight — the thermal views of Phewa Lake and the Annapurnas are life-changing.

activities.title: Forest Hike to World Peace Stupa
activities.description: 30-minute forest trail — the stupa overlooks both the lake and the Himalayas. Free to visit.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Cave Morning Visit
activities.description: Underground river roars through Gupteshwor Cave — impressive stalactites and a small Shiva shrine inside.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum
activities.description: Nepal's best mountain museum — history of Himalayan exploration, summit records, and climbing gear.

activities.title: Begnas Lake Afternoon Escape
activities.description: Take the local bus to Begnas — quieter and more scenic than Phewa, no tourists, fishermen on bamboo rafts.

activities.title: TIMS and ACAP Permits at Tourism Office
activities.description: Get both permits before any trekking — TIMS NPR 2000, ACAP NPR 3000. Bring 2 passport photos.

activities.title: Annapurna Sunset Views from Sarangkot
activities.description: Stay for the sunset if you timed the climb right — the Annapurna skyline turns pink and orange.

activities.title: Carb-Loading Pasta Dinner at Caffe Concerto
activities.description: Fuel up for the first trekking days — generous pasta portions and the best espresso in Pokhara.

activities.title: Nayapul to Birethanti — Trek Section 1
activities.description: First 45 minutes on flat trail beside the Modi Khola river — cross the suspension bridge into Birethanti.

activities.title: Birethanti to Tikhedhunga — Trek Section 2
activities.description: Gentle ascending trail through villages and terraced fields — rhododendrons in full April bloom.

activities.title: Overnight at Tikhedhunga Teahouse
activities.description: Basic teahouse room — clean mattress, blanket, shared bathroom. NPR 200–300 per night.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Breakfast and Early Start from Tikhedhunga
activities.description: Hot porridge or dal bhat before the big climb — start by 6:30 AM to beat the afternoon heat.

activities.title: Ulleri Village Rest and Apple Tea Stop
activities.description: Rest at the top of the steps — local teahouse serves fresh apple tea and homemade cookies.

activities.title: Ascending Through Rhododendron Forest to Ghorepani
activities.description: Walk through the world's largest rhododendron forest in full April bloom — crimson and pink blossoms line the trail.

activities.title: Arrive Ghorepani — Check-in and Rest
activities.description: Drop the pack, take off the boots, and sit on the teahouse terrace with a direct Dhaulagiri view.

activities.title: 4 AM Poon Hill Sunrise Hike
activities.description: Leave the teahouse by headtorch at 4 AM — the 45-minute climb to 3210m is worth every step.

activities.title: Return to Ghorepani for Breakfast
activities.description: Descend in the morning light — breakfast of porridge and honey at the teahouse terrace.

activities.title: Ghorepani to Tadapani Forest Trail
activities.description: Beautiful ridge walk with Himalayan views all the way — rhododendrons, blue sheep, and mountain air.

activities.title: Overnight at Ghandruk Teahouse with View
activities.description: Ghandruk teahouses have the best valley views on the circuit — watch the Annapurnas in the last light.

activities.title: Ghandruk Gurung Cultural Museum Visit
activities.description: Small but excellent — traditional Gurung weapons, costumes, and the history of the Gurkha soldiers.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Sunset Row — Well-Earned Celebration
activities.description: Rent a rowboat for the final sunset — paddle lazily with sore arms and admire the Annapurnas that you climbed past.

activities.title: Free Sarangkot Sunrise Hike — No Jeep
activities.description: Walk up from Lakeside instead of taking a jeep — 1.5 hours, completely free, and more satisfying.

activities.title: Annapurna Panorama at Dawn
activities.description: Watch the Annapurna and Manaslu ranges light up from this famous viewpoint — on a clear July morning it's still stunning.

activities.title: Shared Rowboat at Phewa Lake
activities.description: Share a boat with other backpackers — NPR 100 each instead of NPR 400 alone. Split the rowing too.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Free Forest Hike
activities.description: Take the free forest trail from the lakeshore — 30 min up, breathtaking views from the top.

activities.title: Stupa Panoramic Views — Annapurna and Phewa
activities.description: Sit on the stupa terrace — lake below, mountains above, and total silence. Free and extraordinary.

activities.title: Free Afternoon Nap at Phewa Beach
activities.description: Find a shady spot on the north beach — read, swim, and doze. Completely free and the best way to spend a monsoon afternoon.

activities.title: Early Free Swim at Phewa Lake Shores
activities.description: The lake is calm and warm in the morning — locals swim here too. No entrance fee, no boat required.

activities.title: NPR 80 Tibetan Bread Breakfast at Lakeside
activities.description: Small Tibetan bakeries near the lake serve fresh fried bread with honey for under NPR 100.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Cave Free Viewpoint
activities.description: Walk the back path to view the cave entrance from the outside — the roar of the underground river is impressive.

activities.title: Bus or Taxi Departure from Pokhara
activities.description: Local tourist bus to Kathmandu NPR 700, or taxi to the airport NPR 400 — both leave from Lakeside.

activities.title: Couples Kayak on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Rent a double kayak from the lodge and paddle toward the islands — the Annapurnas in every direction.

activities.title: Romantic Lakeside Dinner at Fishtail Lodge
activities.description: Candlelit dinner with the lake reflecting moonlight — continental and Nepali menu, attentive service.

activities.title: Private Sarangkot Sunrise Drive
activities.description: Private jeep, private guide — undisturbed Himalayan sunrise as the mountains emerge from the clouds.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum Private Tour
activities.description: Learn the history of the mountains you're flying over — first ascents, legendary climbers, and summit attempts.

activities.title: Lake Boat Dinner Under the Stars
activities.description: Some lodges arrange private boat dinners on the lake — floating with lanterns, mountains silhouetted above.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Forest Walk Together
activities.description: The forest trail from the lakeside to the stupa — peaceful, shaded, and deeply romantic in the morning mist.

activities.title: Lunch at Lemon Tree Restaurant Lakeside
activities.description: Consistently excellent Pokhara mid-range dining — fresh pasta, wood-fired bread, and great coffee.

activities.title: Final Phewa Lake Morning Walk
activities.description: Last morning along the promenade — buy flowers, watch the boats, and take final photos of the mountains.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple Farewell Visit
activities.description: Final boat ride to the island temple — offer a butter lamp and a blessing for safe travels home.

activities.title: Airport Transfer and Departure
activities.description: Private taxi to Pokhara Airport — 15 minutes from Lakeside. Check in 2 hours early for domestic flights.

activities.title: Kathmandu Durbar Square Afternoon Walk
activities.description: First taste of Kathmandu's heritage — the royal palace, Kumari Ghar, and Taleju Temple in golden afternoon light.

activities.title: Freak Street and Old Bazaar Wander
activities.description: The original hippie trail — old bookshops, tea stalls, and views into the medieval lanes of Basantapur.

activities.title: Welcome Dinner at Momo Star Thamel
activities.description: Start the trip right with Nepal's national dish — massive platters of steamed buff and chicken momos.

activities.title: Dawn at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: One of the world's largest Buddhist stupas at sunrise — monks in robes, butter lamps, and prayer flags.

activities.title: Swayambhunath Stupa Afternoon Climb
activities.description: The Monkey Temple from below — 365 steps, resident macaques, and the best valley view in Kathmandu.

activities.title: Newari Dinner at Dwarika's Hotel
activities.description: Splurge on one meal here — the heritage setting and Krishnarpan-style dishes are a once-in-a-trip experience.

activities.title: Full Day Bhaktapur UNESCO Heritage
activities.description: All three historic squares in one day — Durbar, Taumadhi, and Dattatreya with a knowledgeable local guide.

activities.title: Pottery Square and Craftsman Studios
activities.description: The medieval guild system is still alive here — potters, weavers, and bronze casters all at work.

activities.title: Return to Kathmandu and Packing for Pokhara
activities.description: Early evening back — pack your bag for tomorrow's tourist bus to Pokhara.

activities.title: Tourist Bus Kathmandu to Pokhara
activities.description: 7–8 hour scenic mountain road — dramatic river gorges, terraced hillsides, and your first view of the Annapurnas.

activities.title: First Glimpse of Phewa Lake at Sunset
activities.description: Walk to the lakeside and see Machhapuchhre's reflection in the water — the Pokhara moment every traveller anticipates.

activities.title: Welcome to Pokhara Dinner at Moondance
activities.description: Classic Lakeside restaurant — warm dal bhat, a cold Everest beer, and the relief of arriving.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Sarangkot Sunrise Hike
activities.description: Walk up from Lakeside in the dark — arrive before dawn for the full Himalayan sunrise experience.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum
activities.description: Nepal's best museum — summit records, legendary climbers, and a scale model of the entire Himalayan chain.

activities.title: Lakeside Restaurant Dinner and Live Music
activities.description: Many Lakeside restaurants host live folk music on Friday and Saturday evenings — ask your guesthouse.

activities.title: Begnas Lake Day Trip by Local Bus
activities.description: Take the local bus east to Begnas — smaller, quieter, and more beautiful than Phewa. Locals fish here in the mornings.

activities.title: Kayaking and Swimming at Begnas Lake
activities.description: Rent a kayak or just swim — crystal clear water, no tourist boats, and a mountain backdrop.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Cave and Davis Falls Return Stop
activities.description: On the way back — underground river cave and the waterfall disappearing into rock.

activities.title: Final Phewa Lake Morning Walk
activities.description: Last walk along the lakeshore before packing — buy a flower from the market and float it on the water.

activities.title: Busy Bee Cafe Farewell Brunch
activities.description: Best brunch in Pokhara — eggs, fresh juice, and the warmest goodbye from the staff.

activities.title: Airport Transfer to Pokhara Airport
activities.description: Taxi to the airport is NPR 400 from Lakeside — allow 30 minutes even for this short trip.

activities.title: Private Sunset Meditation at World Peace Stupa — If Time Allows
activities.description: If the flight is late afternoon, make one last climb to the stupa — sun setting over the Annapurnas for the final time.
